name: @constellation-network/openclaw-audit-plugin
description: Tamper-evident audit trail with Digital Evidence anchoring for AI coding agent activity

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file for audit storage

localRetentionDays.description: Auto-delete local events after N days (default: 365)

localMaxSizeMb.description: Prune oldest events when DB exceeds this size in MB (default: 500)

notificationWebhook.description: Webhook URL for Slack, Discord, or generic notifications on config changes and integrity violations

openclawDir.description: Path to the OpenClaw configuration directory (default: ~/.openclaw)

deApiKey.description: Digital Evidence API key for audit trail anchoring

deOrgId.description: Digital Evidence organization ID (UUID) for fingerprint submission

deTenantId.description: Digital Evidence tenant ID (UUID) for fingerprint submission

deSigningKey.description: SECP256K1 private key (64-char hex) for signing fingerprints. If omitted, an ephemeral key is generated.

deWalletKeyFile.description: Path to file containing a SECP256K1 private key (64-char hex) for wallet-based x402 payment auth. Derives orgId and tenantId from wallet address automatically.

deEventThreshold.description: Number of events to accumulate before anchoring to DE (default: 100)

deIntervalMs.description: Maximum time between DE anchoring attempts in milliseconds (default: 300000)

syncEnabled.description: Master switch for syncing events to gateway (default: true)

syncExcludeCategories.description: Event categories to never sync to gateway (e.g. ["tool"])

redactPromptText.description: Replace prompt content with hash before syncing to gateway (default: false)

redactToolArgs.description: Replace tool arguments with hash before syncing to gateway (default: false)
